misc.title: In Japanese SBS, Sanji is said to smell like “tobacco and the blessings of the sea,” but in English it becomes “tobacco and seafood.” A little nuance is lost. Oda doesn’t mean ordinary seafood, but th
misc.text: In Japanese SBS, Sanji is said to smell like “tobacco and the blessings of the sea,” but in English it becomes “tobacco and seafood.” A little nuance is lost. Oda doesn’t mean ordinary seafood, but the ocean’s blessings, like gifts from a divine mother. 🌟🐠

misc.title: And don’t get me started on the Disney writing… They fought several threats which should be at least at the higher peak of Shippuden (Jura is even stronger than Madara, Hashirama, Kaguya etc.) And… no
misc.text: And don’t get me started on the Disney writing… They fought several threats which should be at least at the higher peak of Shippuden (Jura is even stronger than Madara, Hashirama, Kaguya etc.) And… nobody dies? Or at least no one even suffers a major injury??

misc.title: It doesn’t feel like an emotional, dark and suffering fate for Boruto right now… Nobody dies (Except Sasuke, Naruto and Hinata being sealed). Boruto is viewed as a traitor and killer for exact… hmm… 6
misc.text: It doesn’t feel like an emotional, dark and suffering fate for Boruto right now… Nobody dies (Except Sasuke, Naruto and Hinata being sealed). Boruto is viewed as a traitor and killer for exact… hmm… 6 chapters? After that everyone starts to suddenly trust him?

items.title: In Japanese SBS, Sanji is said to smell like “tobacco and the blessings of the sea,” but in English it becomes “tobacco and seafood.” A little nuance is lost. Oda doesn’t mean ordinary seafood, but th
items.text: In Japanese SBS, Sanji is said to smell like “tobacco and the blessings of the sea,” but in English it becomes “tobacco and seafood.” A little nuance is lost. Oda doesn’t mean ordinary seafood, but the ocean’s blessings, like gifts from a divine mother. 🌟🐠
